items.text: Speed_Control implements PID control logic with P = 1.0, D = 0.0, I = 0.0
items.fragment: Speed_Control implements PID control logic with P = 1.0, D = 0.0, I = 0.0
items.requirement_fragment: Speed_Control implements PID control logic with P = 1.0, D = 0.0, I = 0.0

items.text: Speed_Control computes error e as Target - Actual
items.fragment: Speed_Control computes error e as Target - Actual
items.requirement_fragment: Speed_Control computes error e as Target - Actual

items.text: Speed_Control calculates e_int as integral of e over time
items.fragment: Speed_Control calculates e_int as integral of e over time
items.requirement_fragment: Speed_Control calculates e_int as integral of e over time

items.text: Speed_Control calculates e_dot as derivative of e with respect to time
items.fragment: Speed_Control calculates e_dot as derivative of e with respect to time
items.requirement_fragment: Speed_Control calculates e_dot as derivative of e with respect to time

items.text: Speed_Control ensures Actuator_Input equals P * e + D * e_dot + I * e_int
